arts.ttl: Throw a bomb under the lot and start again'- Paul Heckingbottom blast ahead of Hull City clash
arts.sum: That’s got to be what drives you and makes sure you make the changes," Heckingbottom blasted. That’s what I’d do, but I don’t think I’ll be able to do that, so it’s going to be hard work.

arts.ttl: Frustrated Hull City chief calls for chaos as Championship status in balance
arts.sum: Ruben Selles wants to see his side create some chaos in the final third as he looks to mastermind a much-needed win on Easter Monday. "Well, we are not going to make something magical in that time, it's not going to change a lot," Selles said when asked what he can do to try and find a spark in the final third.

arts.ttl: Hull City inquest into woeful season must wait as relegation battle bites hard
arts.sum: Following a thrilling 3-3 draw with Ipswich Town in their final home outing, Rosenior and owner Acun Ilicali took the applause from a fan base reinvigorated by a season which saw City challenge at the top end of the Championship for the first time since they won promotion to Premier League back in 2016 via that iconic play-off final win at Wembley. Few could argue that things at Hull City have unravelled spectacularly since the sacking of Liam Rosenior just days after last season ended with a 1-0 defeat at Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Hull City predicted XI for Preston North End with Ruben Selles set to ring the changes
arts.sum: Good Friday's 1-0 defeat at Swansea City left the Tigers just two points clear of safety after Luton Town's 1-0 win at relegation rivals Derby County, albeit a game decided by a bewildering decision to give the hosts a penalty early in the second half. But Crooks will be unavailable and it's from the start where the Tigers need to see some attacking intent and positivity, so Selles must start with Kamara on the flank, perhaps bring back Kyle Joseph on the other and deploy Joe Gelhardt in the central attacking role.

A controversial penalty handed Swansea a 1-0 lead that they never relinquished on Good Friday as Hull were condemned to a devastating away defeat in Wales. Ruben Selles' side are only two points clear...
